languages.text: Борт вашего судна извергает из себя несколько мельта-торпед, нацеленных точно на пирамиду. До их соприкосновения с поверхностью остается совсем немного, когда все боеголовки вдруг меняют траекторию и разбиваются о ближайший обелиск. Детонации не происходит — гигантский монумент впитывает в себя заряды без остатка.

Several melta-torpedoes are fired from the side of your ship, aimed precisely at the pyramid. It is not long before they make contact with the surface, when all the warheads suddenly change trajectory and smash into the nearest obelisk. There is no detonation — the giant monument absorbs the charges without any sign of damage.
languages.original_text: Борт вашего судна извергает из себя несколько мельта-торпед, нацеленных точно на пирамиду. До их соприкосновения с поверхностью остается совсем немного, когда все боеголовки вдруг меняют траекторию и разбиваются о ближайший обелиск. Детонации не происходит — гигантский монумент впитывает в себя заряды без остатка.

traits.locale_text: Several melta-torpedoes are fired from the side of your ship, aimed precisely at the pyramid. It is not long before they make contact with the surface, when all the warheads suddenly change trajectory and smash into the nearest obelisk. There is no detonation — the giant monument absorbs the charges without any sign of damage.

Several melta-torpedoes are fired from the side of your ship, aimed precisely at the pyramid. It is not long before they make contact with the surface, when all the warheads suddenly change trajectory and smash into the nearest obelisk. There is no detonation — the giant monument absorbs the charges without any sign of damage.

Several melta-torpedoes are fired from the side of your ship, aimed precisely at the pyramid. It is not long before they make contact with the surface, when all the warheads suddenly change trajectory and smash into the nearest obelisk. There is no detonation — the giant monument absorbs the charges without any sign of damage.

languages.text: あなたの船の側面から、ピラミッドに向けて数発の溶断魚雷が放たれた。魚雷はピラミッドの表面に命中する直前に、突然軌道を変更し、最も近いオベリスクに激突した。爆発は起こらなかった。巨大な記念碑は、ダメージの兆候もなく、魚雷の爆弾を吸収した。
languages.original_text: Several melta-torpedoes are fired from the side of your ship, aimed precisely at the pyramid. It is not long before they make contact with the surface, when all the warheads suddenly change trajectory and smash into the nearest obelisk. There is no detonation — the giant monument absorbs the charges without any sign of damage.

traits.locale_text: あなたの船の側面から、ピラミッドに向けて数発の溶断魚雷が放たれた。魚雷はピラミッドの表面に命中する直前に、突然軌道を変更し、最も近いオベリスクに激突した。爆発は起こらなかった。巨大な記念碑は、ダメージの兆候もなく、魚雷の爆弾を吸収した。

languages.text: Varios torpedos de fusión surgen del lateral de tu nave, camino de la pirámide. No tardan en llegar a la superficie, donde todos los torpedos de repente cambian de trayectoria y chocan con el obelisco más cercano. No se produce ninguna detonación. El inmenso monumento absorbe las cargas sin sufrir daños.
languages.original_text: Several melta-torpedoes are fired from the side of your ship, aimed precisely at the pyramid. It is not long before they make contact with the surface, when all the warheads suddenly change trajectory and smash into the nearest obelisk. There is no detonation — the giant monument absorbs the charges without any sign of damage.

traits.locale_text: Varios torpedos de fusión surgen del lateral de tu nave, camino de la pirámide. No tardan en llegar a la superficie, donde todos los torpedos de repente cambian de trayectoria y chocan con el obelisco más cercano. No se produce ninguna detonación. El inmenso monumento absorbe las cargas sin sufrir daños.

languages.text: 数枚热熔鱼雷从舰侧发射，精准射向那座金字塔。就在弹头即将触及的瞬间，它们突然集体改变弹道，撞向了最近的一座方尖碑。没有爆炸——那座巨碑吞噬了所有弹药，自身毫发无损。
languages.original_text: Several melta-torpedoes are fired from the side of your ship, aimed precisely at the pyramid. It is not long before they make contact with the surface, when all the warheads suddenly change trajectory and smash into the nearest obelisk. There is no detonation — the giant monument absorbs the charges without any sign of damage.

traits.locale_text: 数枚热熔鱼雷从舰侧发射，精准射向那座金字塔。就在弹头即将触及的瞬间，它们突然集体改变弹道，撞向了最近的一座方尖碑。没有爆炸——那座巨碑吞噬了所有弹药，自身毫发无损。

languages.text: Dein Schiff feuert mehrere präzise gezielte Meltertorpedos auf die Pyramide ab. Kurz vor der Oberfläche wechseln die Gefechtsköpfe aber die Flugbahn und schlagen in den nächstgelegenen Obelisken ein. Es gibt keine Detonation ... das riesige Monument absorbiert die Geschosse ohne sichtbaren Schaden.
languages.original_text: Several melta-torpedoes are fired from the side of your ship, aimed precisely at the pyramid. It is not long before they make contact with the surface, when all the warheads suddenly change trajectory and smash into the nearest obelisk. There is no detonation — the giant monument absorbs the charges without any sign of damage.

traits.locale_text: Dein Schiff feuert mehrere präzise gezielte Meltertorpedos auf die Pyramide ab. Kurz vor der Oberfläche wechseln die Gefechtsköpfe aber die Flugbahn und schlagen in den nächstgelegenen Obelisken ein. Es gibt keine Detonation ... das riesige Monument absorbiert die Geschosse ohne sichtbaren Schaden.

languages.text: Geminin yan tarafından, tam olarak piramide hedeflenmiş birkaç melta torpidosu ateşleniyor. Yüzeyle temas etmelerine kısa bir süre kala tüm savaş başlıkları aniden rota değiştiriyor ve en yakın dikili taşa çarpıyor. Patlama olmuyor. Dev anıt, herhangi bir hasar belirtisi olmaksızın yükleri emiyor.
languages.original_text: Several melta-torpedoes are fired from the side of your ship, aimed precisely at the pyramid. It is not long before they make contact with the surface, when all the warheads suddenly change trajectory and smash into the nearest obelisk. There is no detonation — the giant monument absorbs the charges without any sign of damage.

traits.locale_text: Geminin yan tarafından, tam olarak piramide hedeflenmiş birkaç melta torpidosu ateşleniyor. Yüzeyle temas etmelerine kısa bir süre kala tüm savaş başlıkları aniden rota değiştiriyor ve en yakın dikili taşa çarpıyor. Patlama olmuyor. Dev anıt, herhangi bir hasar belirtisi olmaksızın yükleri emiyor.

languages.text: Plusieurs torpilles sont tirées depuis le flanc de votre vaisseau avec la pyramide pour cible. Mais alors qu'elles s'approchent de la surface, toutes les ogives changent subitement de trajectoire et viennent s'écraser contre l'obélisque le plus proche sans même exploser ; le monument absorbe tout simplement les charges sans subir le moindre dégât.
languages.original_text: Several melta-torpedoes are fired from the side of your ship, aimed precisely at the pyramid. It is not long before they make contact with the surface, when all the warheads suddenly change trajectory and smash into the nearest obelisk. There is no detonation — the giant monument absorbs the charges without any sign of damage.
